# autClaw Docs

> autClaw deployment and plugin SDK documentation. Default language is Simplified Chinese (`/cn`). English pages are under `/en`.

## 简体中文

- 首页: /cn
- 部署 autClaw: /cn/getting-started/deploy
- 升级 autClaw: /cn/getting-started/upgrade
- 运行目录: /cn/getting-started/runtime-paths
- Docker 运维: /cn/operations/docker
- Chromium 中文环境: /cn/operations/chromium-cjk

## English

- Home: /en
- Deploy autClaw: /en/getting-started/deploy
- Upgrade autClaw: /en/getting-started/upgrade
- Runtime paths: /en/getting-started/runtime-paths
- Docker operations: /en/operations/docker
- Chromium CJK environment: /en/operations/chromium-cjk

## Plugin SDK

- 中文概览: /cn/plugin-sdk/overview
- 中文 Manifest headers: /cn/plugin-sdk/manifest
- 中文 JavaScript middleware reference: /cn/plugin-sdk/javascript
- 中文 Python middleware reference: /cn/plugin-sdk/python
- 中文 Media sending: /cn/plugin-sdk/media
- English overview: /en/plugin-sdk/overview
- English manifest headers: /en/plugin-sdk/manifest
- English JavaScript middleware reference: /en/plugin-sdk/javascript
- English Python middleware reference: /en/plugin-sdk/python
- English media sending: /en/plugin-sdk/media

## Retrieval rules

- Search first, then read only the matching page or section.
- Prefer `/cn/plugin-sdk/javascript` or `/en/plugin-sdk/javascript` for JavaScript signatures and examples.
- Prefer `/cn/plugin-sdk/python` or `/en/plugin-sdk/python` for Python signatures, return bodies, and parity notes.
- Prefer schemas/types when exact field names matter.
- Do not call autClaw runtime APIs directly from plugins; use `middleware.js` or `middleware.py`.
